introSection: Timmy's Half Pipe Havoc is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. The ride is based on the series The Fairly OddParents and the concept of Timmy wishing for a half-pipe to skateboard on.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride has a single skateboard-shaped train with two spinning circles with six seats on each side.

fullText:
Timmy's Half Pipe Havoc is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. The ride is based on the series The Fairly OddParents and the concept of Timmy wishing for a half-pipe to skateboard on.



The ride has a single skateboard-shaped train with two spinning circles with six seats on each side.
